name: Inpatient Encounter / Hospital Stay Codes
description: CPT, HCPCS, and UB revenue codes for inpatient hospital encounters including initial hospital care, subsequent care, observation, and discharge management. Used in follow-up after hospitalization for mental illness (FUH), transitions of care (TRC), and plan all-cause readmission (PCR) measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
